### Target Interview Profile

### Interview Rules

- Ask about recent behavior and concrete past events.
- Do not ask whether the user would use or pay for a hypothetical product.
- Separate supporting evidence from contradicting evidence after every batch of five interviews.

| Batch | Interviews Count | Supporting Evidence | Contradicting Evidence | Decision |
|---|---:|---|---|---|
